title: Large Fire Bowl Pit 45 centimetre Garden Patio Outdoor Heating Camping BBQ
features: Whether it's on the patio at home, at the beach or whilst camping, fire bowls are the perfect, affordable solution for providing warmth in any outdoor area
Gather around the fire outside in the garden on cool summer evening or use as a way of disposing of weeds growing in the garden.
With a Classic and Nostalgic look, this Iron Cast Fire Bowl is a perfect addition to any Garden.
Use it as a focal point for a family gathering outside i.e. a Barbecue or Grill evening. It can also be used as a decorative furniture item at an event such as a Wedding.
Diameter of bowl 45cm Overall Height 25.5 centimetersm Stand height is 17cm
